title: ASCII Graph Routing Parity
problem: merman-ascii flowchart output is useful but still relies on a linear graph renderer that cannot absorb mermaid-ascii routing parity cleanly.
gates: cargo clippy -p merman-ascii -p merman --features ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings

continue_policy.notes: ASCII graph routing parity lane is complete for the 2026-05-29 time box. It split graph boundaries, added fixture allowlist/gap tracking, shipped grid layout for LR multi-root/branch/fan-in/self/back-edge slices, aligned simple subgraph boxes, and closed with 44 exact copied graph fixture matches. Remaining crossing junctions, duplicate/bidirectional labels, padding directives, TD back-edge labels, and complex nested/external-edge subgraphs should be split into follow-on work.
